cot_prefix: Okay, let's see here. Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. So today must be July 28, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today. That means I need to subtract seven days from July 28, 2002. Let me count backwards. July has 31 days, right? So starting from July 28, subtracting one day would be July 27, then 26, 25, 24, 23, 22... Wait, that's six days. The seventh day would be July 21, 2002. Let me check that again. If today is the 28th, then a week ago would be 28 minus 7, which is 21. So the date would be July 21, 2002. In MM/DD/YYYY format, that would be 07/21/2002. Let me check the
